Microsoft announced $274M expansion at North Range Business Park in April 2014; construction started late spring 2014; first stage operational summer 2015 — matches S&P op year 2015

Cheyenne 3 at North Range is the third phase of the same campus: publicly announced at 2015 news conference with Gov. Mead ($200M+); delayed then construction resumed fall 2018; operational ~2020 per S&P; earliest public signal is the 2015 press conference
